caption: A person with a ring on their left ring finger and wearing a dark long-sleeved shirt is applying glue to a light blue square of paper. The paper sits atop a white grid cutting mat on a white wooden surface. To the left of the mat is a card that reads "D YOU LITTLE letide Cheer You warm my heart" alongside a floral illustration. The person holds a small white squeeze bottle of glue in their right hand. Across the sequence, they apply small dots of glue to different areas of the blue square: starting near the top left, moving to the middle right, then to the bottom left, and finally to the top right. Their left hand remains resting on the edge of the cutting mat to hold the blue paper in place throughout the process.
